dashboard.title: Dashboard — {name}
dashboard.netCashNote: Bank and cash accounts only; brokerage balances excluded. RON values are historical-cost sums at transaction-date BNR rates.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.pagination: {total, plural, one {# transaction} other {# transactions}} · page {page} of {pageCount}
transactions.appliedRates: {count, plural, one {Applied FX rate:} other {Applied FX rates:}}
transactions.cannotEdit: This transaction's posting shape (guided flow or auto tax accrual) cannot be edited with the standard form. Delete and re-create it instead.

forms.receivedAmount: Received amount ({currency}) — accounts use different currencies
forms.discardBody: The details you entered will be lost.

flows.salaryCompaniesOnly: Salary entry is available for companies only.
flows.dividendCompaniesOnly: Dividend entry is available for companies only.

imports.title: Import statement
imports.csvHelp: Upload the ING account-history CSV export (Home’Bank → account history → CSV). Rows land in the review inbox — nothing is booked until you confirm each one.
imports.csvHelpLoaded: Upload the ING account-history CSV export (Home’Bank → account history → CSV). Loaded: {fileName}. Rows land in the review inbox — nothing is booked until you confirm each one.
imports.statementTextPlaceholder: Paste the extracted text of one ING statement…
imports.pasteHelp: Fallback for when no CSV export is available: paste the extracted text of a single ING RON statement. Rows land in the review inbox — nothing is booked until you confirm each one.
imports.noActiveBankAccount: This entity has no active bank account to import a statement into.
imports.pendingReviewSummary: {pending} pending of {total}. Confirm-all books high-confidence rows only — low-confidence, overlap, and category-less rows stay for review.
imports.overlapTitle: Refless row inside a period overlap — confirm individually

reason.bankFeeNoCounterparty: Service Fee row with no counterparty
reason.treasuryIban: counterparty IBAN is a treasury account (RO..TREZ)
reason.unrecognizedPos: POS purchase at an unrecognized merchant — purpose unverified, confirm in review
reason.businessTransferNoMarker: outgoing business transfer to a company counterparty without a professional-services marker
reason.creditNoIncomingMarker: credit without a recognized incoming-funds marker
reason.noClassificationRule: no classification rule matched this row shape

revolut.title: Import Revolut brokerage
revolut.help: Choose the complete Revolut stock-transactions export.
revolut.batchDetail: {parsed} parsed · {staged} review rows · {corrections} correction pairs dropped
revolut.externallyVerified: Cash and holdings were verified against the live Revolut account on 2026-07-11.
revolut.reviewSummary: {total} rows · {excluded} excluded. Exclusions do not book.
revolut.approvalWarning: Approval books every non-excluded row in timestamp order as one atomic operation. Any failure rolls back the entire batch.
revolut.approvedSummary: Booked {booked} rows ({transactions} transactions, {splits} splits); {duplicates} duplicates and {excluded} exclusions.

investments.tradeIntro: Enter the trade or dividend as Revolut printed it — the security's amount and the RON amount; the rate is derived, never typed. A sell previews the exact FIFO lots it will consume before you book it; a dividend shows a display-only tax indication that books nothing.
investments.priceSnapshotsNote: Manual entry is the price source for now (the daily sync endpoint exists; an API source gets picked once real tickers prove coverage).
investments.noBrokerage: This profile has no brokerage account to trade from.
investments.currencyLocked: Currency: {currency} — locked to the account, so a mismatched trade is impossible by construction.
investments.ronBuy: Total charged (RON) — as the broker printed it
investments.ronSell: Total received (RON) — as the broker printed it
investments.ronDividend: Net received (RON) — as the broker printed it
investments.impliedRate: Implied broker rate (derived — you never enter a rate)
investments.reconcileError: These amounts don't reconcile — check for a typo in one of the two totals.
investments.enterRonHint: Enter the RON amount to see the rough tax indication.
investments.roughIndication: Rough indication if this dividend alone were taxed: dividend tax ({rate}): ≈ {amount}. The rate is a seeded placeholder pending the accountant.
investments.cassAnnualNote: CASS on dividends is calculated ANNUALLY against a threshold — a single dividend cannot determine it, so no per-dividend figure is shown; the real calculation belongs to the Phase-5 yearly report. Gross amounts and withholding are also a Phase-5/accountant question — enter the NET amount that landed. Nothing here is written to the ledger.
investments.fifoIntro: FIFO consumption — what booking will do (same walk, previewed read-only):
investments.enterTotalsGain: Enter both totals to see the realized gain in {currency} and RON.
investments.noOpenHoldings: No open holdings yet — book a buy and it appears here.
investments.excludesUnpriced: excludes {count, plural, one {# unpriced holding} other {# unpriced holdings}} (basis {basis})
investments.pricesManualNote: Prices are manual snapshots for now; positions are shown at market where priced.
investments.noHoldingsInvite: No holdings yet. Record your first trade and portfolio value, unrealized gain, and allocation appear here.
investments.nonePricedBasis: {count, plural, one {# holding} other {# holdings}}, none priced yet — cost basis <n>{basis}</n>.
investments.addSnapshotHint: Add a price snapshot on the investments page to value them.
investments.excludesUnpricedBasis: Excludes {count, plural, one {# unpriced holding} other {# unpriced holdings}} (basis <n>{basis}</n>).
investments.nothingPricedAllocation: Nothing priced yet — allocation appears once holdings have prices.
investments.ownerHoldingsUnpriced: {count, plural, one {# holding} other {# holdings}}, unpriced
investments.noSecurities: No securities yet — record a first buy and its security appears here.
investments.latestStored: Latest stored: {price} on {date}. Re-entering a date replaces its snapshot.

profile.unknownEntity: Unknown entity — no profile maps to it.
profile.unknownCompany: Unknown company — no profile maps to it.

ledger.postingsNeedAtLeastTwo: A transaction needs at least two postings.
ledger.postingAmountInvalid: Posting amounts must be non-zero integers in minor units.
ledger.ronAmountInvalid: RON amounts must be integers in minor units.
ledger.taxAccrualCategorized: Tax accrual postings are never categorized.
ledger.categoryOnRealAccount: Categories belong on the equity (P&L) leg, not on real-account postings.
ledger.standardEquityCategoryRequired: The income/expense side of a standard transaction requires a category.
ledger.ronZeroSum: Postings must sum to zero in RON; got {sum} minor units. For cross-currency transfers, mirror the sending leg's RON amount on the receiving leg.
ledger.duplicateExternalRefInTransaction: Duplicate external_ref "{externalRef}" on the same account within one transaction.
ledger.accrualPostingMissing: Accrual references posting {postingIndex} which does not exist.
ledger.accrualPostingNotTaxLiability: Tax accruals must link a posting on a tax_liability account.
ledger.importedRefsMustBePreserved: This transaction was imported from a bank statement; editing it here would drop its statement reference and break duplicate protection. Correct it from the import inbox, or delete it and re-import.
ledger.tradeTransactionCannotBeEdited: This transaction records a trade — its postings, trade row, and lot consumptions are one structure. Delete the trade and re-enter it instead of editing.
ledger.importBatchDuplicateExternalRef: Import batch contains external_ref "{externalRef}" twice for the same account — the long-reference stability assumption is broken; aborting instead of silently dropping a row.
ledger.consumedBuyCannotBeDeleted: Shares from this buy have already been sold — delete the dependent sell(s) first, then this buy.

forms.equityAccountMissing: This entity has no equity account to balance against.
forms.tagCreateFailed: A tag could not be created (soft-deleted name reuse?).
forms.splitSumMismatch: Split amounts must sum to the total.
forms.receivedAmountRequired: Enter the received amount in {currency} (accounts have different currencies).

flows.companyAccountsMissing: Company needs active bank, tax_liability, and equity accounts.

investments.tradeTotalPositive: The trade total must be a positive integer in minor units.
investments.ronTotalPositive: The RON total must be a positive integer in minor units.
investments.sharePricePositive: The share price must be a positive integer in minor units.
investments.ronTradeTotalsMismatch: A RON-denominated trade must have identical RON and original totals.
investments.tradeTotalsDoNotReconcile: The {currency} and RON totals don't reconcile (implied rate {rate}) — one of the two amounts is mistyped; correct it and re-enter.
investments.securityCurrencyMismatch: {ticker} is {securityCurrency} but the account is {accountCurrency} — trade it from the matching-currency brokerage account.
investments.categoryMissing: Category "{categoryName}" ({kind}) is missing for this entity — seed it before booking trades.
investments.equityAccountMissing: This entity has no equity account.
investments.buyMissingPositionLeg: Buy trade {tradeId} has no live position leg — its transaction is inconsistent.
investments.sellOverConsumesLots: Selling {requestedQuantity} but only {heldQuantity} held across live lots of {context}.
investments.brokerageAccountRequired: Trades book against a brokerage cash account.
investments.buyPositionAccountRequired: A buy needs the paired position account.
investments.buyPositionAccountMismatch: The paired account must be a `position` account with the same entity, currency, and owner as the cash account.
investments.sellLotsSpanPositions: The consumed lots span more than one position account — repair the data before selling.
investments.sellDustBasisMismatch: This sell consumes a dust quantity whose basis rounds to zero in one currency only — sell a slightly larger quantity.
investments.sellForeignGainRoundsToZeroRon: This sell has a non-zero foreign-currency gain that rounds to exactly zero RON — adjust the quantity so the RON ledger can carry it.
investments.dividendSecurityRequired: A dividend comes from a holding — pick the security.
investments.tickerInvalid: Ticker must be 1-12 letters/digits (e.g. VUAA, AAPL).
investments.securityCurrencyConflict: {ticker} already exists in {currency} — one security, one currency.
investments.buySellQuantityAndPriceRequired: A buy or sell needs the share quantity and price.
investments.snapshotFuture: A price snapshot cannot be in the future.
investments.snapshotPricePositive: The price must be a positive amount in minor units.
investments.holdingValueUnsafe: Holding value out of safe integer range.
investments.fxCoverageMissing: Historical valuation needs paired EUR and USD exchange-rate history before it can run.
investments.valuationDateOutOfRange: Valuation date {date} is outside the supported FX range ({floor} to today).
investments.stockSplitRatioInvalid: A stock-split ratio must be a whole number greater than one; got {ratio}.
investments.stockSplitNoOpenLots: This stock split has no open lots to adjust.
investments.stockSplitDeltaMismatch: The stock-split delta is {actual}, but the open lots and ratio require {expected}.

imports.statementAccountNotFound: Statement account not found on this entity.
imports.statementAccountMustBeActiveBank: Statements import into an active bank account.
imports.statementAccountMustBeRon: The ING statement importer supports RON current accounts only.
imports.statementTextAlreadyImported: This exact statement text is already imported — open its batch in the inbox instead.
imports.equityAccountMissing: This entity has no equity account to balance against.
imports.statePaymentTaxLiabilityMissing: This entity has no tax_liability account to settle a state payment against.
imports.categoryRequiredForLine: Pick a category for line {lineNo} ({kind}) before booking it.
imports.highConfidenceBookingFailed: Bulk booking hit {count} row error(s). Book the remaining rows individually to inspect each blocker.

revolut.requiredAccountsMissing: The required Revolut USD/EUR cash, position, or clearing accounts are missing. Apply the brokerage-import migrations first.
revolut.csvRequired: Choose the Revolut CSV export first.
revolut.unpairedCorrections: The export contains {count} unpaired dividend-tax correction row(s); approval is blocked.
revolut.securityCurrencyConflict: {ticker} already exists with a different currency.
revolut.batchAlreadyBooked: This Revolut batch is already booked and can no longer be changed.
revolut.rowLocked: A booked or duplicate row cannot be excluded.
revolut.excludedBuyNeededBySell: Cannot approve: sell row {actionLine} consumes excluded buy row {buyLine}.
revolut.excludedBuyNeededBySplit: Cannot approve: stock-split row {actionLine} depends on excluded buy row {buyLine}.
revolut.splitDependencyInvalid: The surviving rows no longer produce an integer stock-split ratio at row {lineNo}.
revolut.splitRatioMissing: No verified split ratio is available for row {lineNo}.
revolut.securityMissing: One or more staged securities are missing before booking.
revolut.bookingRowFailed: Atomic booking failed at CSV row {lineNo} ({causeCode}). Nothing was booked.
revolut.cashAssertionFailed: Post-booking {currency} cash is {actual} minor units; expected {expected}. The whole batch was rolled back.
revolut.holdingsAssertionFailed: Post-booking holdings do not match the approved simulation. The whole batch was rolled back.
revolut.zeroSumAssertionFailed: A booked transaction failed the RON zero-sum assertion. The whole batch was rolled back.
revolut.taxAccrualAssertionFailed: The brokerage import unexpectedly created a tax accrual. The whole batch was rolled back.

tax.taxesCategoryMissing: Company needs a "Taxes" category for the micro revenue tax accrual.
